name: Vanilla Frozen Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk in the top of a double boiler until hot.
2. Add sugar and stir until completely dissolved.
3. Allow mixture to cool.
4. Gradually add small portions of hot milk to the beaten egg yolks.
5. Slowly pour the egg mixture back into the remaining hot milk, stirring constantly.
6. Return the mixture to the double boiler and cook until it thickens slightly and coats the spoon.
7. Remove from heat and allow to chill thoroughly (overnight).
8. Add whipped cream and vanilla extract before churning in an ice cream maker.
